prompt_inputs.goal: Marathon training - carbohydrate loading with 3000+ calorie intake and hydration strategy

solution_criteria: Meal plan totals 3000+ calories with emphasis on carbohydrates (55-60% of total intake)
Includes hydration strategy with specific fluid intake recommendations throughout the day
Compact format presenting all meals and snacks for a single day
Meals are practical and suitable for an athlete in active training
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a high-intensity endurance athlete (marathon runner) requiring 3000+ calories with emphasis on carbohydrate loading and hydration strategy

prompt_inputs.goal: Strength and power development with moderate caloric surplus for muscle gain

solution_criteria: Meal plan spans exactly 1 day with 4-5 meals
Total daily protein is at least 160g (approximately 1.95g per kg bodyweight)
Includes pre-workout and post-workout meals strategically timed around training
Compact format with meals listed concisely without excessive detail
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a strength/power sport athlete (weightlifter) requiring moderate calories with high protein intake and specific meal timing around workout windows

prompt_inputs.goal: Optimize energy levels for afternoon soccer match with proper recovery nutrition

solution_criteria: Meal plan spans full day with 3+ meals/snacks strategically timed around afternoon match
Includes pre-match meal (2-3 hours before), match-day hydration/carbs, and post-match recovery nutrition
All meals respect vegetarian and lactose-free restrictions
Compact format with clear timing and portion guidance
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a sport-specific constraint (professional soccer player with afternoon match) requiring energy management across pre-competition, competition, and recovery phases within the same day
